## Summary
The code review found an exponential time complexity issue in the fibonacci function in src/fibonacci.py. The function can be optimized using memoization to store previously computed Fibonacci numbers.

## Performance Observations
The fibonacci function in src/fibonacci.py has an exponential time complexity due to repeated computation of the same subproblems. It can be optimized using memoization.

## Edge Cases
None found.

## Security & Correctness Issues
None found.

## Architectural Suggestions
None found.

## Validation Outcome
